title: Fix Admin Panel link not appearing in navbar after login

requirements.text: In frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, after Internet Identity login completes and a new authenticated identity is set, explicitly call queryClient.invalidateQueries targeting all queries (or at minimum ['isCallerAdmin'] and ['actor']) so that the admin status check re-runs immediately after login without requiring a page refresh. Use a useEffect that watches the identity object and triggers invalidation whenever the identity changes from null to a non-null value.
acceptanceCriteria: When the admin user logs in via Internet Identity, the Admin Panel link appears in the navbar without requiring a page refresh.
queryClient.invalidateQueries is called after the authenticated identity is set in useActor.ts.
The invalidation targets the isCallerAdmin query key so it re-fetches with the new authenticated actor.

requirements.text: In frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, rewrite the useIsCallerAdmin query with a completely fresh approach: (1) obtain the identity directly from useInternetIdentity, (2) derive a stable principal string from the identity, (3) set enabled to true only when identity is non-null, (4) use the authenticated actor — obtained via a direct createActor call with the identity rather than relying on the cached actor — to call isCallerAdmin(), (5) include the principal string in the query key, and (6) set staleTime to 0 and gcTime to 0 so the result is never stale.
acceptanceCriteria: useIsCallerAdmin uses the authenticated identity to create an actor and call isCallerAdmin().
The query is disabled (returns false) when the user is not authenticated.
The query key includes the principal string so it re-fetches on login/logout.
The query result correctly returns true for the admin principal and false for all others.

requirements.text: In frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx, overhaul the Admin Panel link rendering: (1) call useIsCallerAdmin and destructure its data, isLoading, and isFetching states, (2) show the Admin Panel link only when isLoggedIn is true AND isLoading is false AND isFetching is false AND the returned value is strictly true, (3) add a console.log or debug statement (to be removed later) logging the isCallerAdmin result and loading state so the issue can be diagnosed, (4) ensure the same conditional logic applies to both the desktop nav and the mobile hamburger menu.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin Panel link appears in both desktop and mobile nav immediately after admin login without page refresh.
Admin Panel link does not appear for non-admin authenticated users.
Admin Panel link does not flicker during the loading state of the admin check.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts immutable path — if useActor.ts is immutable, implement the query invalidation in an alternative non-immutable file.
Do not change the backend isCallerAdmin() function signature or admin designation logic.
Timer, question navigation, and test submission logic must remain unchanged.
All other existing navbar links (Home, Dashboard) must remain as-is.
nonGoals: Adding new navigation links to the navbar.
Changing the admin designation logic in the backend.
Modifying the Admin Panel page content or tabs.
Any changes to test-taking, question display, or results pages.
